feeds.title: 药物 · 临床试验
feeds.term: (lecanemab OR donanemab OR "anti-amyloid" OR "tau-targeting" OR trontinemab) AND ("clinical trial"[Publication Type] OR phase OR efficacy)

feeds.title: 机制 · 基础研究
feeds.term: ("Alzheimer Disease"[Mesh]) AND (amyloid OR tau OR neuroinflammation OR APOE OR microglia) AND (mechanism OR pathology OR pathogenesis)

feeds.title: 诊断 · 生物标志物
feeds.term: (Alzheimer) AND ("p-tau217" OR "plasma biomarker" OR "blood biomarker" OR "amyloid PET" OR "GFAP") AND (diagnosis OR detection OR screening)

feeds.title: 预防 · 生活方式
feeds.term: (Alzheimer OR dementia) AND (prevention OR diet OR exercise OR "cognitive reserve" OR lifestyle OR "physical activity") AND (cohort OR "risk factor" OR longitudinal)

feeds.title: 新手村 · 入门综述
feeds.term: ("Alzheimer Disease"[Mesh]) AND ("Review"[Publication Type]) AND (overview OR introduction OR "current understanding" OR primer OR basics)

drug.title: Nanomedicine targeting neuroinflammatory pathways in Alzheimer's disease: a new frontier in inflammopharmacology.
drug.zh: 纳米医学通过精准调控神经炎症通路，为阿尔茨海默病治疗开辟了炎症药理学新前沿。

drug.title: Hospital Budget Impact and Provider-Side Economic Evaluation of Lecanemab and Donanemab Under Japan's National Fee Schedule: A Head-to-Head Linear Model.
drug.zh: 在日本医保体系下，仑卡奈单抗的经济可行性显著优于多奈单抗，门诊边际收益和盈亏平衡病例量更具优势。

drug.title: Sex Differences in Dementia: Survival, Institutionalization, and Costs Based on Dutch Claims Data.
drug.journal: Journal of the American Medical Director
drug.zh: 荷兰全国数据揭示，女性痴呆患者入住护理机构风险更高，但生存期更长，且医疗与长期护理总费用显著高于男性。

drug.title: Tau-mediated Mechanisms in Alzheimer's Disease Pathogenesis.
drug.zh: Tau蛋白介导的病理机制是阿尔茨海默病发病的核心环节，靶向Tau或为治疗新方向。

drug.title: Anti-amyloid nanobody-Fc fusion protein drives potent amyloid clearance through microglial recruitment.
drug.zh: 抗淀粉样蛋白纳米抗体-Fc融合蛋白通过招募小胶质细胞高效清除淀粉样斑块。

drug.title: Statistical inference for saved time based on disease progression curves in Alzheimer's disease research.
drug.zh: 提出基于疾病进展曲线面积计算节省时间的闭合方差公式，解决统计推断难题。

drug.title: Comparative risk of amyloid-related imaging abnormalities with anti-amyloid-β monoclonal antibodies: A systematic review and penalized likelihood network meta-analysis of randomized trials.
drug.zh: 抗淀粉样蛋白单抗治疗阿尔茨海默病时，ARIA-E和ARIA-H风险因药物和APOE4基因型而异。

drug.title: Suboptimal adherence to brain health recommendations in patients pursuing anti-amyloid antibody therapy for Alzheimer's disease: Report from the Brain Health Vital Signs project.
drug.journal: The journal of prevention of Alzheimer's
drug.zh: 接受抗淀粉样蛋白治疗的早期阿尔茨海默病患者，对脑健康生活方式的依从性普遍不足。

mech.title: Exercise-conditioned extracellular vesicles in Alzheimer's disease: a multi-organ signaling network linking peripheral adaptation to brain pathology.
mech.zh: 运动诱导的细胞外囊泡通过多器官信号网络将外周适应与阿尔茨海默病脑部病理联系起来。

mech.title: Passive amyloid-β immunotherapy in Alzheimer's disease: a multicellular clearance system beyond plaque removal.
mech.zh: 被动Aβ免疫疗法通过多细胞清除系统发挥超越斑块清除的阿尔茨海默病治疗作用。

mech.title: The Exercise-CTSS-AD Axis: a novel framework for understanding exercise-induced neuroprotection in Alzheimer's disease.
mech.zh: 运动通过抑制CTSS（组织蛋白酶S）经抗炎、抗衰老和代谢调节通路发挥阿尔茨海默病神经保护作用。

mech.title: Heterogenous microglial reactivity contrasts with stable vascular transcriptional programs in mouse models of Alzheimer's, CADASIL, and Traumatic Brain Injury.
mech.zh: 小胶质细胞反应在AD等模型中异质性显著，而血管转录程序保持稳定。

mech.title: Advances in Tricyclic Compounds for the Treatment of Alzheimer's Disease.
mech.zh: 三环化合物凭借多靶点调控与结构可调性，成为阿尔茨海默病治疗的新兴候选骨架。

mech.title: Oral Microbial Extracellular Vesicles as Novel Mediators of Alzheimer's Pathogenesis: A Critical Review of the Periodontal-Brain Axis.
mech.zh: 口腔菌群胞外囊泡通过牙周-脑轴介导神经炎症与Aβ/tau病理，是阿尔茨海默病的新型致病因子。

mech.title: Phytohemagglutinin: A Tool for Inducing Neuroinflammation Mediated In Vitro and In Vivo Modeling of Alzheimer's Disease Pathology.
mech.zh: PHA可诱导神经炎症，构建阿尔茨海默病体外与体内模型。

mech.title: Tau-mediated Mechanisms in Alzheimer's Disease Pathogenesis.
mech.zh: Tau蛋白介导的神经退行性机制是阿尔茨海默病发病的核心，而非Aβ。

dx.title: Predictive value of plasma p-tau217 for Alzheimer's dementia compared to other blood-based biomarkers.
dx.zh: 血浆p-tau217在9年内预测阿尔茨海默病痴呆优于p-tau181、NfL和GFAP。

dx.title: Amyloid-like nanofilm-decorated antifouling field effect transistor biosensor array for enhancing Alzheimer's disease diagnosis.
dx.zh: 基于类淀粉样纳米膜抗污场效应晶体管生物传感器阵列实现多种tau蛋白超灵敏同时检测，显著提升阿尔茨海默病诊断准确性。

dx.title: Establishment and Characterization of an Aβ-Related Alzheimer's Disease-like Tree Shrew Model Following CA1-Coordinate-Directed Stereotaxic AAV Delivery of Human Triple-Mutant APP.
dx.zh: 通过CA1区定向注射AAV递送人三突变APP，成功构建了具有Aβ病理和认知缺陷的树鼩阿尔茨海默病模型。

dx.title: The Centiloid Scale in Amyloid PET Imaging: Current Role in Alzheimer's Disease Diagnosis, Treatment Planning, and Monitoring During Anti-Amyloid Therapy: A Clinical Perspective.
dx.zh: Centiloid量表标准化淀粉样蛋白PET量化，为AD诊断、抗淀粉样蛋白治疗筛选及疗效监测提供统一阈值。

dx.title: Structural MRI across lifespan reveals differential thalamic trajectories in Down syndrome.
dx.zh: 唐氏综合征患者丘脑体积随年龄加速萎缩，与阿尔茨海默病血浆生物标志物升高显著相关。

dx.title: Spatiotemporal dynamics of tau extent and load increase in Alzheimer's disease across four longitudinal cohorts.
dx.zh: 阿尔茨海默病tau蛋白扩散范围在低负荷区更敏感，而负荷指标在高负荷区更有效。

dx.title: Glial molecular signatures as a liquid biopsy marker in Alzheimer's disease diagnosis.
dx.zh: 胶质细胞分子特征可作为阿尔茨海默病液体活检新标志物，优于传统蛋白指标。

dx.title: Performance of Alzheimer Disease Plasma Biomarkers in Patients With Prion Diseases.
dx.zh: 血浆p-tau217等AD生物标志物在朊病毒病中显著升高，无法可靠区分阿尔茨海默病与朊病毒病。

prev.title: Cardiovascular risks in psychiatric disorders and psychiatric risks in cardiovascular disorders: implications for prevention and clinical management - a large-scale umbrella review encompassing 76 meta-analyses.
prev.zh: 精神与心血管疾病双向风险关联显著，阿尔茨海默病需纳入共病管理。

prev.title: Associations of Insulin Sensitivity with Risk of All-Cause and Cause-Specific Dementia: A Prospective Cohort Study.
prev.zh: 低胰岛素敏感性指标eGDR与全因痴呆、阿尔茨海默病及血管性痴呆风险显著相关，且可修饰AD遗传易感性。

prev.title: Association between dietary antioxidant quality score and cognitive function in older adults: A cross-sectional study based on NHANES 2011-2014.
prev.zh: 膳食抗氧化质量评分越高，老年人认知障碍风险越低。

prev.title: Multi-threshold polygenic risk improves hippocampal-based cognitive decline prediction.
prev.zh: 多阈值多基因风险评分整合海马体积，显著提升阿尔茨海默病认知衰退预测效能。

prev.title: Frailty-related plasma proteomic signatures and key biomarkers for new-onset dementia and its subtypes: A prospective cohort study.
prev.zh: 该研究通过大规模血浆蛋白质组学分析，揭示了衰弱相关蛋白特征可预测新发痴呆及其亚型风险。

prev.title: Baseline and placebo-related imaging, cerebrospinal fluid, plasma biomarker, and cognitive findings in unimpaired PSEN1 E280A mutation carriers and non-carriers in the Alzheimer's Prevention Initiative Autosomal Dominant Alzheimer's Disease Colombia Trial.
prev.zh: PSEN1 E280A突变携带者基线及安慰剂组生物标志物与认知数据揭示无症状期AD病理变化。

prev.title: The relationship between low-sodium salt substitutes and cognitive function among middle-aged and older adults: The Chinese Square Dance Cohort.
prev.zh: 中国中老年人群使用低钠盐替代品与更好的认知功能和更低的轻度认知障碍风险显著相关。

prev.title: Determinants of fractal motor activity regulation: insights from a large community-dwelling multi-ethnic population.
prev.zh: 社区老年人分形运动调节受年龄、性别、种族及体力活动显著影响，提示其作为阿尔茨海默病早期标志物需考虑这些混杂因素。

intro.title: Oral Microbial Extracellular Vesicles as Novel Mediators of Alzheimer's Pathogenesis: A Critical Review of the Periodontal-Brain Axis.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是嘴里牙周炎的细菌会释放微小颗粒，可能通过血液进入大脑，引发炎症，从而增加老年痴呆的风险。

intro.title: Peripheral and Central miRNA Signatures in Alzheimer's Disease: Tissue-Specific Variability, Sex-Associated Differences, and Implications for Blood-Based Biomarkers.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是科学家发现血液和大脑里一种叫“微小RNA”的小分子能帮助更早发现阿尔茨海默病，但男女和不同身体部位的结果有差别，提醒大家别盲目相信单一检测。

intro.title: Analysis of the Efficacy of Acetylcholinesterase Inhibitors in the Treatment of Alzheimer's Disease, Literature Review.
intro.zh: 这篇综述总结了一类老药（胆碱酯酶抑制剂）对阿尔茨海默病的效果，帮普通人判断这类药到底值不值得用。

intro.title: Metabolic reprogramming in Alzheimer's disease: Interaction between receptor tyrosine kinase signaling, noncoding RNAs, and Neuron-Glia energy networks.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是阿尔茨海默病其实是大脑“没电了”，搞懂这个能帮普通人明白为什么预防要关注饮食和运动，而不是只盯着记性变差。

intro.title: Osteoimmuno-brain axis: a bridge connecting osteoporosis and cognitive decline and its clinical significance in dementia and Alzheimer's disease.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是骨头和大脑之间如何通过免疫系统互相影响，帮普通人理解为什么骨质疏松可能和记性变差有关。

intro.title: Advances in the Core Role and Mechanisms of Mitochondrial Dysfunction in Alzheimer's Disease.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑细胞里的能量工厂坏了会加速老年痴呆，看懂它有助于普通人从保护能量入手预防大脑衰老。

intro.title: Chemokines in Alzheimer's Disease: Early Defence, Late Damage and the Impact of Sex and Infection.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑里一种叫“化学信使”的小分子，在老年痴呆早期保护大脑、晚期却帮倒忙，还受性别和感染影响，帮普通人看懂病因和预防方向。

intro.title: [Research progress on role of PINK1/Parkin-mediated mitophagy in Alzheimer's disease and TCM interventions].
intro.journal: Zhongguo Zhong yao za zhi = Zhongguo zho
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是细胞里一种清理垃圾的机制出问题会加速老年痴呆，并介绍了中药如何帮忙修复这个机制。
